points.text: Through inhaling air contaminated by droplets/aerosols [doc1_covid19.txt:chunk_00024]
By touching eyes, nose, or mouth after touching contaminated surfaces [doc1_covid19.txt:chunk_00004]
Through small airborne particles containing the virus [doc1_covid19.txt:chunk_00004]
At closer range, but also over longer distances indoors [doc1_covid19.txt:chunk_00024]
Through the air in tiny droplets of fluid [doc2_covid19.txt:chunk_00000]
By breathing in droplets or particles from close people [doc2_covid19.txt:chunk_00008]
From person to person, even from someone with no symptoms [doc2_covid19.txt:chunk_00007]
When people with COVID-19 cough, sneeze, breathe, sing or talk [doc2_covid19.txt:chunk_00007]
Through small droplets when infected person coughs, sneezes, speaks, sings or breathes [doc3_covid19.txt:chunk_00003]
By touching mouth, nose or eyes after touching contaminated surfaces [doc3_covid19.txt:chunk_00005]
